---
title: "Awards & Recognition"
---

This page documents selected awards and external recognition related to my work in GIS education, cartography, outreach, professional service, and community-engaged geospatial projects. These recognitions reflect both individual work and collaborative efforts with students, colleagues, community partners, and professional organizations.

## Teaching, Outreach, and Service

Content coming soon.

## Cartography and Geospatial Work

Content coming soon.

## Professional and Community Recognition

Content coming soon.

## Student and Collaborative Project Recognition

Content coming soon.
